metadata.description: Local Austender MCP server exposing aggregate_contracts and proxy_ocds tools
GoDevMCP server for Go code analysis, navigation, documentation lookup, and validation; install with `go install github.com/fpt/go-dev-mcp/godevmcp@latest`
Headless browser MCP for DOM inspection and scraping via Puppeteer

llm.notes: POST prompt/model/mcpConfig to this endpoint; set OPENAI_API_KEY or compatible provider envs
